verdict: Promising concept with clear metrics and regulatory awareness, but lacks technical feasibility details and concrete milestones.
strengths: Clear description of sensor modalities and integration
Specific key metrics (accuracy, battery life, latency, adherence)
Acknowledgment of regulatory (FDA Class II) and privacy (HIPAA/GDPR) constraints
Realistic cost target and status indication
weaknesses: No technical feasibility analysis or risk assessment
Missing competitive landscape and market size
No mention of team expertise or development timeline
top_fixes: Add a section on technical feasibility and risk mitigation strategies
Define concrete milestones with specific dates or phases
Include competitive analysis and target market size
